opinion.h: MORAND v. CITY OF RALEIGH, 357 U.S. 343 (1958)
MORAND ET UX. v. CITY OF RALEIGH. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NORTH CAROLINA. No. 949. Decided June 23, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Herman L. Taylor and Samuel S. Mitchell for appellants.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
